acceptance_criteria.text: Write the bead-space audit artifact with all six required sections.
Include file:line citations in Sections 1 through 3.
Run Socraticode K=10 searches for polish, convergence, dedup, plan_to_bead, bead body, and br create.
Address the four Tier-1 bead-space gaps from the agent-flywheel.com analysis.
Recommend 1-3 fix beads without creating new beads.
